card_description: Leo Bulero (meaning "Bulero = bull; Leo = lion") is a character in Philip K. Dick's *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*. Head of Perky Pat Layouts Inc. who battles Palmer Eldritch's competing drug Chew-Z. Name note: Lion-bull — powerful beast of commerce. Corporate titan versus cosmic invader — capitalism against alien gnosis. First appears in *The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch*. Context: "Dick identifies his novel *Ubik* as an accurate depiction of the "unscrambling" of reality into Form I (Life/Real) and Form II (Dead/Hologram)."
first_work: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch
work_list: The Three Stigmata of Palmer Eldritch

linked_segments.summary: Dick identifies his novel *Ubik* as an accurate depiction of the "unscrambling" of reality into Form I (Life/Real) and Form II (Dead/Hologram). He posits that Form I (Zebra) is a "supralunar" invader
linked_segments.title: 1976-09-15_Dorothy_142.txt
